message:
refactor(codegen): Migrate math.zig to ZigBuilder callback patterns

- Replace broken emitMethodStart/emitBuiltinStart refs with builder patterns
- Migrate genMin, genMax: Use withCall callback for @min/@max builtins
- Migrate genRound: Use withParen callback for try expression
- Migrate genPow: Add emitAsF64 helper, use withCall for @rem and type casts
- Migrate genOrd: Use withCall callback for @as expression
- Migrate genDivmod: Use withAnonLiteral and emitCallExpr for tuple/bigint
- Migrate genHash: Use withCall callbacks for bool/string fast paths
- All bracket closings now guaranteed by callback pattern
